gold.rationale: 文本的核心信息是对“Tornado Emergency”概念的准确认读，并结合美国多地同期强对流天气背景说明其为何成为社交平台热词；这一表述与美国国家气象预警体系的常见定义、伊利诺伊州局地风暴破坏报道、以及夏威夷受Kona Low系统影响的信息相符。所配图片分别对应受损现场、预警分级示意、风暴破坏实例和灾害监测画面，未见图文错配、伪造或误导性改写，因此应判定为属实。

atomic_points.post_summary: 该帖文解释了美国气象预警体系中“龙卷风紧急状态”（Tornado Emergency）的定义及其与Watch和Warning的区别，并列举了3月11日前后伊利诺伊州、新泽西州及夏威夷等地受强对流天气影响的具体情况及官方建议。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 这两天，美国社交平台上“Tornado Emergency”一词频繁出现，中文通常可译作“龙卷风紧急状态”或“龙卷风紧急警报”。
atoms: 美国社交平台上“Tornado Emergency”一词频繁出现
“Tornado Emergency”中文通常译作“龙卷风紧急状态”
“Tornado Emergency”中文通常译作“龙卷风紧急警报”

sentence_level.sentence_text: 据外媒在3月11日前后的报道，随着美国中西部、东部以及太平洋方向部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃，公众对龙卷风预警分级的关注明显上升。
atoms: 外媒在3月11日前后有相关报道
美国中西部强对流天气趋于活跃
美国东部强对流天气趋于活跃
美国太平洋方向部分地区强对流天气趋于活跃
公众对龙卷风预警分级的关注明显上升

sentence_level.sentence_text: 由于各州面临的天气形势并不一样，一些地方已经出现龙卷风造成的破坏，另一些地方则还处在强风暴和龙卷风风险提示阶段。
atoms: 美国各州面临的天气形势不同
一些地方已经出现龙卷风造成的破坏
另一些地方处在强风暴风险提示阶段
另一些地方处在龙卷风风险提示阶段

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在美国的气象预警体系中，公众最容易混淆的，往往是Watch、Warning和Emergency这三个层级。
atoms: 美国气象预警体系包含Watch、Warning和Emergency三个层级
公众容易混淆Watch、Warning和Emergency这三个层级

sentence_level.sentence_text: Tornado Watch一般表示“具备发生条件”，也就是大气环境支持龙卷风形成，相关地区居民应提高警惕，持续关注天气变化；
atoms: Tornado Watch表示“具备发生条件”
Tornado Watch意味着大气环境支持龙卷风形成
Tornado Watch发布时居民应提高警惕
Tornado Watch发布时居民应持续关注天气变化

sentence_level.sentence_text: Tornado Warning则意味着风险进一步升级，即已经观测到龙卷风，或雷达信号显示龙卷风很可能正在形成，并将影响某一区域，这时就需要立刻采取避险措施；
atoms: Tornado Warning意味着风险进一步升级
Tornado Warning意味着已经观测到龙卷风
Tornado Warning意味着雷达信号显示龙卷风很可能正在形成
Tornado Warning意味着龙卷风将影响某一区域
Tornado Warning发布时需要立刻采取避险措施

sentence_level.sentence_text: 至于Tornado Emergency，则比普通龙卷风警报更高一级，而且启动次数极少，通常只用于已经确认有大型且可能致命的龙卷风在地面活动，或者有极强雷达证据表明其正在造成严重生命威胁和灾难性破坏。
atoms: Tornado Emergency比普通龙卷风警报更高一级
Tornado Emergency启动次数极少
Tornado Emergency通常用于已确认有大型且可能致命的龙卷风在地面活动
Tornado Emergency通常用于有极强雷达证据表明正在造成严重生命威胁和灾难性破坏的情况

sentence_level.sentence_text: 换句话说，“龙卷风紧急警报”并不意味着当天所有地区都进入这一等级，它只会在极端罕见、危险程度极高的局部情况下发布。
atoms: “龙卷风紧急警报”不意味着当天所有地区都进入该等级
“龙卷风紧急警报”只在极端罕见、危险程度极高的局部情况下发布

sentence_level.sentence_text: 伊利诺伊州在3月11日凌晨的这轮天气过程中，已经出现了实际影响。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 从这轮天气过程来看，“Tornado Emergency”之所以会在美国社交平台上成为热词，关键就在于多地天气风险上升，带动了公众对相关预警术语的搜索和讨论。
atoms: “Tornado Emergency”在美国社交平台上成为热词
多地天气风险上升带动了公众对相关预警术语的搜索和讨论

sentence_level.sentence_text: 不过在具体理解上，仍需把“可能发生”“已经警报”和“极端紧急”这几个层次区分清楚。
atoms: 公众需区分“可能发生”“已经警报”和“极端紧急”这几个预警层次

sentence_level.sentence_text: 并不是出现强风暴，或者发布普通龙卷风警报，就一定会进入“龙卷风紧急警报”级别。
atoms: 出现强风暴不一定会进入“龙卷风紧急警报”级别
发布普通龙卷风警报不一定会进入“龙卷风紧急警报”级别

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在防灾避险方面，美国气象和应急部门长期强调的原则一直比较明确：如果住宅或建筑物内有地下室，应优先进入地下室避险；
atoms: 美国气象和应急部门强调防灾避险原则
如果有地下室，应优先进入地下室避险

sentence_level.sentence_text: 如果没有地下室，就应立即前往建筑最低层，选择远离窗户、靠近房屋中心的位置，最好是小房间、走廊或卫生间等相对封闭区域，尽量降低飞散物和玻璃破裂带来的伤害风险。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 在强对流活跃时段，提前了解所在地的预警等级，准备好可接收通知的手机应用和基本应急用品，往往比临时作出判断更重要。
atoms: 在强对流活跃时段，提前了解预警等级很重要
在强对流活跃时段，准备好可接收通知的手机应用很重要

paragraph_level: Tornado Emergency是美国气象预警中最高级别，仅用于确认有大型致命龙卷风或极强雷达证据显示灾难性破坏的情况，启动次数极少。
Tornado Watch表示具备龙卷风形成条件，Tornado Warning表示已观测到龙卷风或雷达显示其正在形成，需立即避险。
3月11日凌晨，伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县Moro一带遭受EF1级龙卷风袭击，造成房屋、农场设施等受损，暂无严重伤亡通报。
伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部农村地区出现风暴破坏，国家气象局正在勘察以确认是否曾有龙卷风落地。
3月11日，新泽西州面临强风暴、大风、冰雹及孤立龙卷风风险，红十字会建议公众下载应急预警应用。
夏威夷群岛受缓慢移动的“Kona Low”风暴系统影响，面临强降雨、山洪、大风、雷暴及可能的冰雹和龙卷风。
美国官方建议：有地下室优先进入，无地下室则去最低层中心封闭区域，并提前通过手机接收预警信息。

atoms: image_1 shows a rural landscape with significant storm damage under an overcast sky.
A large tree in the foreground has been snapped at the top, exposing splintered wood.
A white house in the foreground has a large section of its roof torn off, exposing wooden beams.
A red barn in the background has severe roof damage with metal sheeting torn away.
A tall concrete silo stands next to the damaged red barn.
Debris is scattered across the grassy fields and road.
A red fire truck and a white pickup truck are parked on the road.
A person wearing a yellow safety vest stands near the vehicles.
An American flag is flying on a pole near a white house in the background.
image_2 is an infographic titled 'TORNADO TERMINOLOGY'.
The top right corner displays logos for 'JAN DILS ATTORNEYS AT LAW, LLC' and 'STORM TEAM'.
The graphic is divided into three vertical columns: 'WATCH' (yellow), 'WARNING' (red), and 'EMERGENCY' (purple).
The 'WATCH' column contains the text 'BE PREPARED!' and 'CONDITIONS ARE FAVORABLE FOR TORNADOES TO FORM'.
The 'WARNING' column contains the text 'TAKE ACTION!' and 'TORNADO SPOTTED OR INDICATED BY RADAR'.
The 'WARNING' column background shows a radar screen with a green cone and red dot.
The 'EMERGENCY' column contains the text 'TAKE ACTION!' and 'SEVERE THREAT TO HUMAN LIFE AND CATASTROPHIC DAMAGE'.
The background of the infographic shows a tornado funnel cloud approaching a green house.
image_3 shows the aftermath of a storm at a commercial or industrial site.
A large metal building structure has collapsed, with twisted metal beams and siding scattered.
A white semi-trailer is parked on the left, partially under the debris.
A maroon pickup truck is parked on the right side of the frame.
The ground is wet with puddles, indicating recent rain.
The sky is grey and cloudy.
image_4 is a screenshot of a software interface titled 'DisasterAWARE Pro'.
The main view is a map of the Hawaiian islands.
A color-coded overlay on the Big Island indicates rainfall intensity.
The legend on the right is titled 'Cumulative Rainfall Forecast (3 Day)'.
The legend lists rainfall amounts ranging from '0 - 0.5 inches' to '> 30 inches'.
The map shows labels for 'Honolulu', 'Wailuku', 'Hilo', and 'Kailua-Kona'.
Weather icons (sun/clouds) are visible on the map.
A sidebar on the left lists layers such as 'Demography', 'Infrastructure', and 'Hazards'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A rural scene depicting severe storm damage. A large tree is snapped in the foreground, and a white house has a missing roof section. In the background, a red barn is heavily damaged next to a silo. Emergency vehicles and a responder in a yellow vest are present on the road amidst scattered debris.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An educational infographic explaining tornado terminology. It features three columns labeled WATCH, WARNING, and EMERGENCY with corresponding definitions and action items. The background shows a tornado approaching a house. Logos for 'JAN DILS' and 'STORM TEAM' are at the top.

cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A collapsed metal building structure with twisted beams and siding, lying next to a white trailer and a red pickup truck in a muddy lot.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows severe structural damage consistent with the text's mention of 'buildings and ground facilities damaged'.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to show the 'Kona Low' storm system and rainfall forecast affecting Hawaii.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A screenshot of a weather map application (DisasterAWARE Pro) showing the Hawaiian islands with color-coded rainfall forecasts and storm icons.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: The image displays a weather map of Hawaii with rainfall data, directly supporting the text's claim about the 'Kona Low' system affecting the islands.

retrieved_evidence.text: 据伊利诺伊州应急管理部门和当地媒体 3 月 11 日报道，伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县莫罗地区当日遭遇一场被初步评估为 EF1 级的龙卷风袭击。现场图片显示，部分房屋屋顶受损，农场建筑和树木被不同程度刮倒，局部地区出现短时停电。据当地官员介绍，截至目前尚未接获严重人员伤亡的即时报告，损失统计和等级评估仍在由国家气象局及县级相关部门联合开展，后续情况将根据调查结果进一步公布。
伊利诺伊州Moro地区在3月11日前后遭遇强对流天气，据相关人员介绍，当地确认受到一次EF1级龙卷风影响，导致多处房屋屋顶被掀翻，外墙受损，院落中的农用机械和棚屋倒塌或移位，农田周边树木折断。美国国家气象局指出，这类中等强度龙卷风仍可对轻型建筑和农场设施造成显著破坏，也使公众更加关注“Tornado Emergency”这类极端等级提示在预警体系中的作用。
新泽西州红十字会 3 月 11 日通过社交平台及社区渠道向部分地区居民发布提醒，指出当日晚间和次日清晨局地可能遭遇强风暴天气过程。据该机构介绍，提醒内容包括呼吁民众密切关注当地气象部门发布的龙卷风警报、强雷暴预警等信息，并提前检查家庭应急包、手机电量及收音设备状况。红十字会同时建议社区照顾老年人和行动不便者，必要时协助其了解避险路线和可利用的临时避难场所。

美国国家气象局在近期风暴预报中反复强调，要区分“Tornado Watch”“Tornado Warning”和极少发布的“Tornado Emergency”。据气象播报说明，Watch表示大气条件有利于龙卷风等强对流发展，公众需保持关注；Warning意味着监测雷达或现场目击已表明龙卷风正在发生或即将发生，需立刻进入掩蔽处；而“Tornado Emergency”则是在大型、极危险且可能致命的龙卷风已被确认并正威胁人口稠密区域时才会启用的最高紧迫度警示。
国家气象局圣路易斯办公室近日表示，伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部部分农村地区在强对流天气过程中出现明显风暴破坏迹象，包括树木折断、屋顶受损及农用设施受影响等。据气象部门介绍，已派出损害评估团队赶赴当地，对倒伏痕迹和建筑破坏模式进行现场勘查，以判断是否有龙卷风在地面形成并造成破坏。相关人员指出，目前尚无定论，正式结论将待勘验数据汇总分析后再对外发布。
美国气象部门近日在通报中强调，所谓“龙卷风紧急状态”或“龙卷风紧急警报”是一类比普通龙卷风警报更高一级的特别提示，仅在极端危险情况下才会启用。据多名气象专家介绍，该提示通常在人口较为密集地区已出现重大龙卷风威胁、并被认为可能造成严重破坏和人员伤亡时发布，意在强调事态的紧迫性，敦促当地居民立刻采取最严格的避险措施。相关应用标准由国家气象局及地方预警机构依据实时监测综合研判。
美国国家气象局本周就龙卷风相关预警分级作进一步说明。据介绍，“龙卷风观察”表示一个区域内已具备形成龙卷风的气象条件，民众需提高警觉；“龙卷风警报”则意味着已通过地面观测或雷达迹象确认该区域存在或极可能出现龙卷风，需要群众立即采取防护行动；而“龙卷风紧急状态”被描述为极端罕见的最高级别警示，多指大型且具有潜在致命风险的龙卷风已经在地面活动，预警区域居民被要求马上前往最安全地点避险。
太平洋灾害中心近日发布情况说明称，一个缓慢移动的“科纳低压”风暴系统正影响整个夏威夷群岛，预计在未来一段时间内持续带来强降雨、山洪、破坏性大风和强雷暴活动。据该中心专家介绍，相关系统还可能在局地伴随冰雹和龙卷风现象，部分山区和低洼地带面临较高的洪涝与滑坡风险。当地政府已呼吁居民减少不必要外出，关注山洪预警和天气更新，并遵从相关部门发布的道路封闭和疏散指示。

⚠️ 🚨 Considering today's forecasted weather we could see severe storms in parts of #NJ. Download the free Red Cross Emergency App for weather alerts like tornado warnings, and other helpful features like preparedness checklists. #NJwx
美国多家气象及应急管理机构近日重申，在强对流天气和龙卷风风险上升时，应严格遵循基础避险常识。据专家介绍，若建筑物配有地下室，建议人员优先前往地下室避险，尽量远离窗户和外墙；在没有地下室的住宅或公共建筑内，则应快速前往最低楼层、靠近建筑中心的小房间或内侧走廊，借助坚固家具进行遮蔽。相关部门同时提醒民众提前熟悉家庭应急预案，以便在预警发布后第一时间作出反应。

An EF1 tornado struck the Moro, Illinois, area in Madison County on Wednesday, March 11, 2026. The storm caused significant damage to several homes and farms in the region. Witnesses described terrifying moments as the tornado passed, tearing off roofs, toppling trees, and damaging structures. Emergency crews are assessing the extent of the damage and providing assistance to affected residents. Fortunately, there were no immediate reports of serious injuries, but the community now faces the arduous task of rebuilding. The event serves as a reminder of nature's unpredictable force.

Substantial damage from overnight storm in southeastern St Clair County. Damage in rural Marissa, Lenzburg and St Libory.

National Weather Service's Damage Assessment Team is surveying damage to determine if a tornado touched down.

St. Clair County Emergency Management Director Herb Simmons tells KMOX, with his years of experience, believes the damage looks like tornado destruction.
圣克莱尔县在本轮影响美国中部的强对流过程中出现多处建筑损毁，据当地应急部门介绍，仓储设施和农用建筑屋顶被掀离，部分墙体坍塌，金属板材和木梁被抛散在密苏里河周边地带，道路一度被杂物阻塞。气象部门正通过现场勘查和雷达资料评估是否存在龙卷风落地迹象，并结合是否达到“Tornado Warning”或更高级别警示的条件，进一步厘清此次风暴事件的性质和强度。

夏威夷群岛在同一时期也面临恶劣天气威胁。根据太平洋灾害中心及其DisasterAWARE平台的监测信息显示，受“Kona Low”低压系统影响，当地部分区域出现累积降雨显著增加、强风和山洪、泥石流等多重风险叠加的情况。监测图层叠加了降雨、风暴和地形等要素，为当地政府和公众提供实时灾害风险概览，尽管与美国本土“Tornado Emergency”所针对的龙卷风灾害类型不同，但同样体现严密的气象与公共安全监测体系。
美国国家气象局及多州应急管理机构近日陆续发布预报称，受强冷暖气团交汇及高空急流等因素影响，本月 11 日前后美国中部、南部及东部部分地区将出现或已经出现强对流天气过程。据有关气象人员介绍，此轮天气过程可能伴随冰雹、雷暴大风及局地龙卷风等强烈天气现象，多地已发布严重雷暴和龙卷风相关预警。相关部门提醒民众密切关注最新天气信息和本地疏散指引，必要时提前做好应急准备。

Just in Case...

Never hurts to go over Severe Weather safety, especially since we are expecting some severe storms later today. The potential is there for a Tornado or two. 

A Watch means 'watch'... but a Warning means take action now. 

An Emergency (God Forbid) is exceptionally rare for our region, but it's the highest sense of urgency with a tornado warning. This means a large and potentially deadly tornado is confirmed to be on the ground. There were a couple of these issued during the March 2012 Outbreak in Eastern KY and Western WV. 

In regards to your safe spot - a basement is always best, but the lowest floor away from windows near the center of your home isn't a bad second option.

Tornado Watch表示具备龙卷风形成条件，Tornado Warning表示已观测到龙卷风或雷达显示其正在形成，需立即避险。

3月11日，新泽西州面临强风暴、大风、冰雹及孤立龙卷风风险，红十字会建议公众下载应急预警应用。

美国官方建议：有地下室优先进入，无地下室则去最低层中心封闭区域，并提前通过手机接收预警信息。

image_1 shows a rural landscape with significant storm damage under an overcast sky.
A large tree in the foreground has been snapped at the top, exposing splintered wood.
A white house in the foreground has a large section of its roof torn off, exposing wooden beams.
A red barn in the background has severe roof damage with metal sheeting torn away.
A tall concrete silo stands next to the damaged red barn.
Debris is scattered across the grassy fields and road.
A red fire truck and a white pickup truck are parked on the road.
A person wearing a yellow safety vest stands near the vehicles.
An American flag is flying on a pole near a white house in the background.
image_2 is an infographic titled 'TORNADO TERMINOLOGY'.
The top right corner displays logos for 'JAN DILS ATTORNEYS AT LAW, LLC' and 'STORM TEAM'.
The graphic is divided into three vertical columns: 'WATCH' (yellow), 'WARNING' (red), and 'EMERGENCY' (purple).
The 'WATCH' column contains the text 'BE PREPARED!' and 'CONDITIONS ARE FAVORABLE FOR TORNADOES TO FORM'.
The 'WARNING' column contains the text 'TAKE ACTION!' and 'TORNADO SPOTTED OR INDICATED BY RADAR'.
The 'WARNING' column background shows a radar screen with a green cone and red dot.
The 'EMERGENCY' column contains the text 'TAKE ACTION!' and 'SEVERE THREAT TO HUMAN LIFE AND CATASTROPHIC DAMAGE'.
The background of the infographic shows a tornado funnel cloud approaching a green house.
image_3 shows the aftermath of a storm at a commercial or industrial site.
A large metal building structure has collapsed, with twisted metal beams and siding scattered.
A white semi-trailer is parked on the left, partially under the debris.
A maroon pickup truck is parked on the right side of the frame.
The ground is wet with puddles, indicating recent rain.
The sky is grey and cloudy.
image_4 is a screenshot of a software interface titled 'DisasterAWARE Pro'.
The main view is a map of the Hawaiian islands.
A color-coded overlay on the Big Island indicates rainfall intensity.
The legend on the right is titled 'Cumulative Rainfall Forecast (3 Day)'.
The legend lists rainfall amounts ranging from '0 - 0.5 inches' to '> 30 inches'.
The map shows labels for 'Honolulu', 'Wailuku', 'Hilo', and 'Kailua-Kona'.

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports specific weather events (Illinois tornado, NJ warnings, Hawaii Kona Low) and standard meteorological definitions, with all claims corroborated by the retrieved evidence.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a factual, well-aligned summary of weather events and safety guidelines, with no textual distortions or semantic inconsistencies detected.

images.scene_description: A rural landscape showing significant storm damage, including a white house with a missing roof section, a red barn with roof damage, a silo, and a large tree snapped in half. Emergency vehicles (police, fire) and personnel are visible on the road amidst scattered debris.
images.explanation: Clean news photo matching the described event.

images.scene_description: An infographic titled 'TORNADO TERMINOLOGY' with a logo for 'JanDils Attorneys at Law, LLC'. It features three colored columns (Yellow, Red, Purple) defining 'WATCH', 'WARNING', and 'EMERGENCY' with corresponding text and background images of storms/houses.

images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite graphic design (infographic) with overlaid text banners and colored columns, rather than a raw photograph.
images.explanation: This is a designed infographic used to explain terminology, flagged as V2 due to its composite nature.

images.scene_description: A close-up view of a destroyed metal building structure, likely a warehouse or shed, with twisted wooden beams and corrugated metal sheets draped over a white trailer and a red pickup truck. The ground is wet and muddy.
images.explanation: Clean news photo matching the described event.

images.explanation: Clean data visualization matching the described event.

image_analysis.global_notes: The images are consistent with the post text and evidence. Image 2 is an infographic (V2) but accurately represents the content described.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖文关于龙卷风预警分级及各地天气情况的描述均与事实相符，仅因使用了包含文字叠加的科普信息图而存在轻微的视觉编辑，但这不影响核心信息的准确性。
judge.reasoning_trace: All textual subclaims are supported by retrieved evidence. Image 2 is an infographic with overlays, triggering V2 Visual Editing. No other distortions found. 1 mild L2 label -> Mostly True.
judge.core_claim: 该帖文解释了美国气象预警体系中“龙卷风紧急状态”（Tornado Emergency）的定义及其与Watch和Warning的区别，并列举了3月11日前后伊利诺伊州、新泽西州及夏威夷等地受强对流天气影响的具体情况及官方建议。
key_subclaims: Tornado Watch表示具备发生条件，Warning表示已观测到或雷达显示正在形成，Emergency为最高级别且极少发布。
3月11日伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县Moro一带遭EF1级龙卷风袭击，造成房屋和农场设施受损。
伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部出现风暴破坏，气象部门正在勘察确认是否曾有龙卷风落地。
新泽西州面临强风暴风险，红十字会建议公众下载应急预警应用。
夏威夷受“Kona Low”影响，面临强降雨和山洪风险，DisasterAWARE平台提供监测数据。
官方建议有地下室优先进入，无地下室则去最低层中心封闭区域避险。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Tornado Watch表示具备发生条件，Warning表示已观测到或雷达显示正在形成，Emergency为最高级别且极少发布。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[4][6][7]详细确认了这三个层级的定义和区别，与文本描述完全一致。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 3月11日伊利诺伊州麦迪逊县Moro一带遭EF1级龙卷风袭击，造成房屋和农场设施受损。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[1][11]明确报道了3月11日Moro地区EF1级龙卷风及造成的破坏。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 伊利诺伊州圣克莱尔县东南部出现风暴破坏，气象部门正在勘察确认是否曾有龙卷风落地。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[5][12]确认了圣克莱尔县的风暴破坏及NWS损害评估团队的现场勘察工作。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 新泽西州面临强风暴风险，红十字会建议公众下载应急预警应用。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[3][9]确认了新泽西州红十字会的提醒及下载应用建议。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 夏威夷受“Kona Low”影响，面临强降雨和山洪风险，DisasterAWARE平台提供监测数据。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[8][15]确认了Kona Low的影响及DisasterAWARE平台的使用。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 官方建议有地下室优先进入，无地下室则去最低层中心封闭区域避险。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[10]确认了标准的龙卷风避险建议。

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post's core claims regarding weather events and terminology are fully supported by evidence. The only distortion is the use of a designed infographic (Image 2) which involves visual editing (V2), but this is a standard educational aid and does not mislead the audience or contradict the text. With only one mild V2 label and no fabrication or context errors, the post is Mostly True.

image_findings.explanation: Image shows rural storm damage consistent with the text's description of tornado impacts in Illinois.
Image is an infographic with overlaid text and graphics explaining terminology, which constitutes visual editing/design but accurately reflects the text's educational content.
Image shows structural damage consistent with the text's mention of storm destruction.
Image is a screenshot of the DisasterAWARE Pro interface showing Hawaii rainfall, matching the text's description.
